results.title: Armstrong Number Check
results.description: Write a program to check if 153 is an Armstrong number. An Armstrong number of 3 digits equals the sum of cubes of its digits (1Â³ + 5Â³ + 3Â³ = 153).
results.code:
# Static input
num = 153

# Store original number
original_num = num

# Initialize sum
sum_of_cubes = 0

# Calculate sum of cubes of digits
while num > 0:
    digit = num % 10
    sum_of_cubes += digit ** 3
    num //= 10

# Check Armstrong condition
if sum_of_cubes == original_num:
    print(f"{original_num} is an Armstrong number")
else:
    print(f"{original_num} is not an Armstrong number")
